prestazioni: Engine swap to L15B7 (1.5L DOHC i-VTEC Turbo, 182 PS stock) with a custom Hondata KPro V4 ECU tune optimized for E85 fuel, targeting 250 WHP via a Garrett GT2860RS turbo (0.63 A/R, 60 trim) on a custom cast manifold with TIG-welded 304 stainless steel downpipe and 3-inch exhaust featuring a GReddy Revolution RS muffler for backpressure control.

Full drivetrain reinforcement: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (1.5-way) with 4.785 final drive ratio, reinforced 5-speed manual transmission (F20C synchros), and a Fidanza 8.5lb flywheel paired with an ACT HDSS clutch (6 puck, cerametallic) for rapid engagement under boost.

Suspension overhaul with Tein Flex Z coilovers (8kg/mm front, 6kg/mm rear) revalved for JDM Fit Shuttle chassis (GE6/GE8), polyurethane bushings (Energy Suspension 9.5104G) for subframe and control arms, and Cusco 22mm front / 19mm rear sway bars to eliminate body roll during high-G cornering on Wangan-style touge runs.
estetica: Custom Rocket Bunny RS Type-F widebody kit (FRP construction) with extended fenders (30mm front, 40mm rear) to clear 225/40R17 Falken Azenis RT660 tires on Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (17x8 +35 offset), retaining the OEM rear door functionality for practicality.

Full JDM-spec lighting conversion: Stanley HID projectors (55W, 6000K) with Morimoto D2S ballasts, Depo LED taillights (smoked lens, sequential turn signals), and a custom carbon fiber hood (Seibon, 30% weight reduction) featuring a functional NACA duct feeding the Garrett intercooler.

Interior stripped and reinforced with a Buddy Club P1 Racing seat (fixed-back, FIA-approved) on a custom Bride slider mount, Takata 4-point harness, and a Momo Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede) paired with a NRG quick-release hub. Full sound deadening (Dynamat Xtreme) and a custom roll cage (1.75" OD, 0.120" wall thickness) integrated with the OEM roof rails for structural rigidity.
